Actions.Text: REFERRED TO NEW YORK CITY EDUCATION

Title: Establishes a free lifeguard training program in high schools in a city with a population of one million or more
Summary: Establishes a free lifeguard training program in high schools in a city with a population of one million or more and covers all fees and costs of a state-approved lifeguard certification exam for any student upon completion of the training program.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to establishing a free lifeguard training program in high schools in a city with a population of one million or more
